title: Settings
presetsDescription: Apply a group of settings with one click
recommendedDesc: Enable ADB, block OTA updates, disable package verification, keep screen on
privacyDesc: Suspend Facebook tracking and analytics apps
stayOnDesc: Prevent the screen from turning off when connected to power
otaUpdatesDesc: Prevent automatic firmware updates from Meta
packageVerificationDesc: Skip Google Play Protect checks when installing apps
hiddenApiDesc: Allow apps to use hidden Android APIs
overlayDesc: Fix invisible buttons in the app installer
